metadata.description: Sentinel Suite — one toolkit for serious Claude Code work: a commit/PR guardrail, graph-based code intelligence, a large skills/agents library, and multi-agent orchestration, plus a unified MCP server to connect them all.

plugins.name: sentinel-guard
plugins.description: Sentinel Suite Guard — keeps secrets, internal codenames, unreleased versions, and AI attribution out of your commits and PRs. Python engine + agent + skill + hooks.

plugins.name: sentinel-graph
plugins.description: Sentinel Suite Graph — token-efficient, graph-based code intelligence (impact radius, architecture overview, hubs/bridges, semantic search). Powered by code-review-graph (MIT).

plugins.name: sentinel-orchestrator
plugins.description: Sentinel Suite Orchestrator — run many Claude Code sessions in parallel as scoped 'tentacles' wired to the rest of Sentinel Suite. Powered by Octogent (MIT).

plugins.name: sentinel-skills
plugins.description: Sentinel Suite Skills — a large ready-made library of agents, skills, and commands for TDD, security, code review, and language-specific work. Powered by ecc (MIT).
